title: Strange Attractor Studio
description: Explore 5 chaotic dynamical systems in 3D — drag to rotate, tune parameters, choose color modes, and export PNG.
concept: An interactive 3D strange attractor explorer powered by Canvas 2D. Choose from five chaotic systems (Lorenz, Rössler, Halvorsen, Thomas, Chen), adjust their parameters in real time, rotate the 3D visualization by dragging, switch between velocity-hue, depth, time-gradient, rainbow, and monochrome color modes, and export the current frame as a high-res PNG. Orbits are stored in a circular buffer and rendered using a dark-room exposure technique — new points glow bright while old ones fade, creating beautiful comet-trail depth cues. On rotation, a full ImageData redraw instantly refreshes all historical points at the new angle.
features: 5 chaotic attractors with per-system parameter sliders
3D perspective projection with mouse-drag rotation and pinch zoom
5 color modes: velocity, depth, time-gradient, rainbow, monochrome
Speed, trail length, and glow intensity controls
PNG export with black background compositing
URL hash sharing of full parameter set

interaction.touch: Drag to rotate, pinch to zoom
interaction.click: Buttons: select attractor, color mode, clear, pause, export PNG, copy share link
